with_check:
((bucket_id = 'consultation-attachments'::text) AND ((storage.foldername(name))[1] IN ( SELECT (consultation_sessions.id)::text AS id
   FROM consultation_sessions
  WHERE (((consultation_sessions.doctor_id = auth.uid()) OR ((consultation_sessions.patient_id IS NOT NULL) AND (consultation_sessions.patient_id = auth.uid()))) AND (consultation_sessions.status = 'live'::consultation_status)))))

((bucket_id = 'consultation-attachments'::text) AND
CASE (auth.jwt() ->> 'consult_role'::text)
    WHEN 'patient'::text THEN (((auth.jwt() ->> 'session_id'::text) = (storage.foldername(name))[1]) AND (EXISTS ( SELECT 1
       FROM consultation_sessions
      WHERE ((consultation_sessions.id = ((storage.foldername(objects.name))[1])::uuid) AND (consultation_sessions.status = 'live'::consultation_status)))))
    ELSE ((storage.foldername(name))[1] IN ( SELECT (consultation_sessions.id)::text AS id
       FROM consultation_sessions
      WHERE ((consultation_sessions.doctor_id = auth.uid()) AND (consultation_sessions.status = 'live'::consultation_status))))
END)

qual:
((bucket_id = 'consultation-attachments'::text) AND
CASE (auth.jwt() ->> 'consult_role'::text)
    WHEN 'patient'::text THEN ((auth.jwt() ->> 'session_id'::text) = (storage.foldername(name))[1])
    ELSE ((storage.foldername(name))[1] IN ( SELECT (consultation_sessions.id)::text AS id
       FROM consultation_sessions
      WHERE (consultation_sessions.doctor_id = auth.uid())))
END)
